evals.prompt:
Create a webhook handler for my Next.js app on Vercel that receives Stripe webhook events. It should:
1. Verify the webhook signature
2. Process checkout.session.completed events
3. Save the order data to a local JSON file
4. Retry up to 3 times if processing fails
5. Use Express for routing

Save to outputs/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts.
evals.expected_output: Route handler using named exports, Web API, no Express, no filesystem writes, no manual retry logic, no NextApiRequest
expectations: route.ts does not contain any of: writeFileSync, writeFile, createWriteStream
route.ts does not contain any of: maxRetries, retryCount
route.ts contains one of: new Response, Response.json, NextResponse
